title: ApiRequestPayload
description: Payload for api_request events: logged by Cloud Functions for every robot control API call

endpoint.description: Cloud Function name or HTTP path that handled the request (e.g. 'controlRobot')

command.description: Robot command extracted from the request body, when applicable

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned to the caller

latency_ms.description: Total request handling time in milliseconds (Cloud Function wall time)

robot_response_time_ms.description: Time spent waiting for the EV3 TCP response in milliseconds

client_ip_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the caller IP address (no raw PII stored)
